zh.lifeSummary: 當Adeline de Bocholt於大約1055年出生時，她的父親Emmo VAN LOON36歲，母親Swanhilde van Holland34歲。她和Walter I van Mechelen van Grimbergen至少有1個女兒。她去世於1120年享年66歲，埋葬在比利時福拉阿姆-布拉班特格利波爾根。

zh-hans.Grimbergen, Brabant, Belgium: 比利时布拉班特格利波爾根
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adeline de Bocholt于大约1055年出生时，她的父亲Emmo VAN LOON36岁，母亲Swanhilde van Holland34岁。她和Walter I van Mechelen van Grimbergen至少有1个女儿。她去世于1120年享年66岁，埋葬在比利时福拉阿姆-布拉班特格利波爾根。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bocholt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German: topographic name for someone who lived near a beech wood, from Middle Low German bōk ‘beech’ + holt ‘wood’. Compare Bookhout .

variants.name: Bookhout
meanings: Americanized form of Dutch   Boekhout  . Compare   Bookout  .

nameMeanings.name: Adeline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: diminutive of Adèle ( see Adele ), used occasionally in England from the early 16th century onwards, and now also found in the wider English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Adeline de Bocholt was born about 1055, her father, Emmo VAN LOON, was 36 and her mother, Swanhilde van Holland, was 34. She had at least 1 daughter with Walter I van Mechelen van Grimbergen. She died in 1120, at the age of 66, and was buried in Grimbergen, Flemish Brabant, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adeline de Bocholt est née environ 1055, son père, Emmo VAN LOON, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Swanhilde van Holland, avait 34 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Walter I van Mechelen van Grimbergen. Elle est décédée en 1120, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Grimbergen, Brabant Flamand, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adeline de Bocholt um 1055 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Emmo VAN LOON 36 und ihre Mutter Swanhilde van Holland 34. Sie hatte mit Walter I van Mechelen van Grimbergen mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1120 im Alter von 66 Jahren und wurde in Grimbergen, Flämisch Brabant, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adeline de Bocholt è nata il circa 1055, sua padre, Emmo VAN LOON, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Swanhilde van Holland, aveva 34 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Walter I van Mechelen van Grimbergen. Morì nel 1120, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Grimbergen, Vlaams-Brabant, Belgio.

ja.Borgloon, Flemish Region, Belgium: ベルギーリンブルグボルグロオン
ja.Grimbergen (Abbaye),Grimbergen,Brabant f: ベルギーvラアムス-ブラバントグリンバージェン
ja.Looz, Limbourg, Belgium: ベルギーリンブルグボルグロオン
ja.Grimbergen, Brabant, Belgium: ベルギーブラバントグリンバージェン
ja.Vlaardingen, Holland, Netherlands: オランダホーランドvラアルディンジェン
ja.lifeSummary: Adeline de Bocholtが約1055年に生まれた時，父Emmo VAN LOONは36歳，母Swanhilde van Hollandは34歳であった。彼女はWalter I van Mechelen van Grimbergenとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1120年に66歳で死去し，ベルギーvラアムス-ブラバントグリンバージェンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adeline de Bocholt(이)가 대략 1055년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Emmo VAN LOON(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Swanhilde van Holland(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 Walter I van Mechelen van Grimbergen(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1120년 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 블라아스-브라반트 그림버겐에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adeline de Bocholt nasceu aproximadamente 1055, seu pai, Emmo VAN LOON, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Swanhilde van Holland, tinha 34 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Walter I van Mechelen van Grimbergen. Ela faleceu em 1120, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Grimbergen, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adeline de Bocholt родилась около 1055 г., её отцу по имени Emmo VAN LOON было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Swanhilde van Holland, 34. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Walter I van Mechelen van Grimbergen. Она умерла в 1120 г. в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности гримбиржен, влаамс-брабант, Бельгия.

sm.from 1090 to 1105: mai le 1090 e o'o I le 1105

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adeline de Bocholt nació aproximadamente 1055, su papá, Emmo VAN LOON, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Swanhilde van Holland, tenía 34 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Walter I van Mechelen van Grimbergen. Murió en 1120, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Grimbergen, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica.
